The stopwatch measures to 1/100th of a second, showing you the time, date and day of the week. They announce every full hour with a beep and you can easily set an alarm. They also offer a 12 or 24-hour mode and a countdown timer (from less than 10 hours). The countdown can then be paused for up to 30 seconds. You will also find it useful to set the step frequency between 10 and 320 steps per 1 minute, the pedometer and the walking or running pace. Thanks to the rubberised surface and knurling, they do not slip and are easy to hold. The stopwatch also has a power saving mode in case of inactivity. They are waterproof and you can hang them comfortably around your neck with a lanyard. items.raw_desc: Hulahopp HMS HHW11 Plus Size Súlyozott masszázs hulahopp karika, rózsaszín:The HMS HHW11 Plus Size Massage Hula Hoop is an ideal addition to any home gym. Exercising with the hoop will help to slim the abdomen and waist and also reduce the tissues of the thighs and buttocks. The structure is composed of 26 parts, but at least 14 parts are needed to close the hoop. The individual parts conceal a rail into which an anchor fitted with 4 ball bearing castors is inserted before closing. A weight weighing 300 g is then attached to the anchor using a length-adjustable string. The string can be adjusted to a length of 20-30 cm, the longer it is, the heavier the weight will be due to centrifugal force.
